property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium\jdk-17.0.16.8-hotspot\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium\jdk-17.0.16.8-hotspot\bin;C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium\jdk-8.0.462.8-hotspot\bin;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-20\bin;C:\Program Files\nodejs\;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\GitHub CLI\;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Server 8.0\bin;C:\Program Files\Maven\apache-maven-3.9.13\bin;C:\Program Files\Docker\Docker\resources\bin;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Shell 8.0\bin\;C:\Users\adars\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python313\Scripts\;C:\Users\adars\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python313\;C:\Users\adars\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Launcher\;C:\Users\adars\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;;C:\Users\adars\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Users\adars\AppData\Roaming\npm;C:\mongosh\;C:\Users\adars\AppData\Local\Programs\Antigravity\bin;C:\Users\adars\AppData\Local\Programs\Windsurf\bin;C:\Users\adars\.local\bin;.

testcase.name: testProcessContract_Success
testcase.system-out: 21:51:26.373 [main] INFO com.documind.pipeline.worker.ContractProcessingConsumer -- Kafka Consumer picked up contract processing for ID: 8ac056ea-d0c6-4369-b363-703530dc74c3 21:51:26.375 [main] INFO com.documind.pipeline.worker.ContractProcessingConsumer -- Downloading file from S3: key123 21:51:26.375 [main] INFO com.documind.pipeline.worker.ContractProcessingConsumer -- Extracted 22 characters from PDF. 21:51:26.375 [main] INFO com.documind.pipeline.worker.ContractProcessingConsumer -- Contract processing successfully completed and JSONB loaded! ID: 8ac056ea-d0c6-4369-b363-703530dc74c3 21:51:26.376 [main] WARN com.documind.pipeline.worker.ContractProcessingConsumer -- HIGH RISK DETECTED in Contract 8ac056ea-d0c6-4369-b363-703530dc74c3. Routing event to Legal Team stream...
